Arsenal 'Well Advanced' in Race for Dominik Szoboszlai - Milan & PSG Also Interested

Arsenal are said to be in advanced talks to sign Red Bull Salzburg youngster and Hungary international Dominik Szoboszlai.
The 19-year-old has long been on the Gunners' radar, having impressed with his performances in the Austrian Bundesliga last season.
Szoboszlai has ten goals and 16 assists in 37 games in all competitions this campaign, sparking interest from a host of top European clubs.

Since the return of Austrian top flight football, Szoboszlai has been in sensational form, scoring and assisting a combined total of five in just seven appearances. Operating as an attack-minded central midfielder who can also play in behind the striker, Szoboszlai has been identified as an ideal replacement to the frozen out Mesut Ozil.

In a series of tweets, Lonjon stated: "PSG asked about Dominik Szoboszlai. Profile quite similar to that of Milinkovic-Savic. Other big clubs on it. The player's entourage was probed and not insensitive to interest. Cost 25/30m. Arsenal and AC Milan well advanced."

Szoboszlai could become the latest star to emerge fromSalzburg's illustrious production line. Erling Haaland burst on to the scene before joining Borussia Dortmund, while Takumi Minamino also impressed and ended up signing for Liverpool in the same month.

Teenager Szoboszlai joined the club in 2017 from Austrian second-tier side FC Liefering and has since become an integral part of the squad.

Salzburg are thought to value their young superstar at £22.7m, and he would become the first Hungarian to play for Arsenal if a deal was agreed.

However, according to French journalist Manu Lonjon, the Gunners face competition from the likes of Milan and Paris Saint-Germain in the race for Szoboszlai's signature.

阿迪達：重返溫布萊 ！

【Now Sports】阿仙奴打敗錫菲聯晉級，主帥阿迪達為大軍能夠重返溫布萊感到欣喜，直言是時候爭取錦標。

「我實在很開心，來到這個艱難作賽的地方並獲勝。我們重返溫布萊，我實在為球員的態度與表現感到開心。」阿仙奴領隊阿迪達在球隊周日以2:1險勝錫菲聯，從而晉身英足盃4強後說。

他不忘語帶相關：「這是個嘗試及爭取贏得錦標，從而角逐歐洲賽的大好機會。自從復賽後，我們共進行4場作客比賽，多得英超賽會為我們安排每3天比賽一次，而我們周三又要再出戰（英超主場對諾域治）。」

「錫菲聯在部署上實在出色，令對手受壓，我們在手榴彈戰術中失球，實在不易防範，但最終能夠取得勝利。」他續說。

Arsenal 'Well Advanced' in Race for Dominik Szoboszlai - Milan & PSG Also Interested

Arsenal are said to be in advanced talks to sign Red Bull Salzburg youngster and Hungary international Dominik Szoboszlai.
The 19-year-old has long been on the Gunners' radar, having impressed with his performances in the Austrian Bundesliga last season.
Szoboszlai has ten goals and 16 assists in 37 games in all competitions this campaign, sparking interest from a host of top European clubs.

Since the return of Austrian top flight football, Szoboszlai has been in sensational form, scoring and assisting a combined total of five in just seven appearances. Operating as an attack-minded central midfielder who can also play in behind the striker, Szoboszlai has been identified as an ideal replacement to the frozen out Mesut Ozil.

In a series of tweets, Lonjon stated: "PSG asked about Dominik Szoboszlai. Profile quite similar to that of Milinkovic-Savic. Other big clubs on it. The player's entourage was probed and not insensitive to interest. Cost 25/30m. Arsenal and AC Milan well advanced."

Szoboszlai could become the latest star to emerge fromSalzburg's illustrious production line. Erling Haaland burst on to the scene before joining Borussia Dortmund, while Takumi Minamino also impressed and ended up signing for Liverpool in the same month.

Teenager Szoboszlai joined the club in 2017 from Austrian second-tier side FC Liefering and has since become an integral part of the squad.

Salzburg are thought to value their young superstar at £22.7m, and he would become the first Hungarian to play for Arsenal if a deal was agreed.

However, according to French journalist Manu Lonjon, the Gunners face competition from the likes of Milan and Paris Saint-Germain in the race for Szoboszlai's signature.

Arsenal hero Gilberto Silva confused by ‘nervous’ Matteo Guendouzi

Former Arsenal midfielder Gilberto Silva can’t quite work out current Gunners star Matteo Guendouzi, confused about his best position and why the Frenchman shows nerves on the pitch.

Guendouzi has been through a tumultuous few days in his Arsenal career, reportedly taunting Brighton players about their salaries during the 2-1 defeat to the Seagulls, and grabbing Neal Maupay by the throat at the Amex.

The 21-year-old has since been left out of the side by Gunners boss Mikel Arteta, not even on the substitutes’ bench for the Premier League clash with Southampton or Sunday’s FA Cup meeting with Sheffield United, after requesting a transfer.

Gilberto is a fan of the combative midfielder and wants him to stay at the club, but feels he needs to find his best position and be braver on the ball.

‘I like him. He seems a very interesting player. He has ability, he has pace to go forward,’ Gilberto said at the Collision From Home conference.

‘But sometimes I just feel a little bit confused about which position he plays. Does he want to be like a No.6, to protect the back four, or a No.8 to go box to box.

‘If he wants to be a No.6 he has to play simple and he has to mind his temper. Sometimes I see him a little bit nervous, sometimes that’s unnecessary.

‘He needs to just play his game – he has quality. Don’t pay attention to other things. When I see him play he suddenly starts to get nervous in some situations and he loses his focus.’

Arsenal hero Gilberto Silva confused by ‘nervous’ Matteo Guendouzi

Former Arsenal midfielder Gilberto Silva can’t quite work out current Gunners star Matteo Guendouzi, confused about his best position and why the Frenchman shows nerves on the pitch.

Guendouzi has been through a tumultuous few days in his Arsenal career, reportedly taunting Brighton players about their salaries during the 2-1 defeat to the Seagulls, and grabbing Neal Maupay by the throat at the Amex.

The 21-year-old has since been left out of the side by Gunners boss Mikel Arteta, not even on the substitutes’ bench for the Premier League clash with Southampton or Sunday’s FA Cup meeting with Sheffield United, after requesting a transfer.

Gilberto is a fan of the combative midfielder and wants him to stay at the club, but feels he needs to find his best position and be braver on the ball.

‘I like him. He seems a very interesting player. He has ability, he has pace to go forward,’ Gilberto said at the Collision From Home conference.

‘But sometimes I just feel a little bit confused about which position he plays. Does he want to be like a No.6, to protect the back four, or a No.8 to go box to box.

‘If he wants to be a No.6 he has to play simple and he has to mind his temper. Sometimes I see him a little bit nervous, sometimes that’s unnecessary.

‘He needs to just play his game – he has quality. Don’t pay attention to other things. When I see him play he suddenly starts to get nervous in some situations and he loses his focus.’

路爾斯減薪助阿仙奴增兵

【Now Sports】大衛路爾斯早前續約阿仙奴，引來廠迷鬧爆，但原來這名巴西國腳為了球會的將來，願意減人工。

大衛路爾斯（David Luiz）在去年夏天以800萬鎊從車路士加盟阿仙奴，簽約1年，周薪12.5萬鎊，原本是球隊第5高人工的球員。

不過，根據英國《電訊報》報道，路爾斯早前跟兵工廠續約1年時接受了減薪，好讓球隊有財政空間去買斷中堅柏保路馬里、右閘蘇亞利斯。

總監伊度就曾表示：「我很高興球隊未來有這些球員在陣，他們一直是領隊阿迪達跟我的計劃之中，為球隊帶來正確的平衡。」

不少廠迷早前得知路爾斯就算在場上犯錯頻頻，仍然獲得續約，紗紗在網上狂鬧阿仙奴。未知他們得知路爾斯的苦心後，會不會改變想法？
